description: TAP protocol — tenant intent packaging and gateway ETL execution tools

scripts.name: parse_csv
scripts.description: Parse a student enrollment CSV into a normalised JSON array

args.name: csv_path
args.description: Path to student enrollment CSV

scripts.name: package_intent
scripts.description: Package normalised student rows into a TAP intent packet for enroll_students

args.name: rows_json
args.description: JSON array of normalised student rows (output of parse_csv.py)

args.name: user_intent
args.description: Original user intent string describing the operation

args.name: intent_id
args.description: Override the auto-generated intent ID

args.name: correlation_id
args.description: Override the auto-generated correlation ID

args.name: seq
args.description: Batch sequence number

args.name: source_file
args.description: Source file name recorded in provenance metadata

scripts.name: extract_skill_hints
scripts.description: Extract skill hints from a trajectory JSON export for injection into subsequent runs

args.name: trajectory_json
args.description: Path to trajectory JSON exported from mix aetheris trajectory --export

scripts.name: gap_analysis
scripts.description: Analyse a TAP result packet and report non-idempotent and failed records

args.name: result_json
args.description: TAP result packet as a JSON string (output of stub_cot1.py or cot1)

scripts.name: ping_ct
scripts.description: Check connectivity to the ct-api and return latency in milliseconds

scripts.name: validate_intent
scripts.description: Validate a TAP intent packet against the vocabulary doc

args.name: intent_json
args.description: TAP intent packet as a JSON string

args.name: vocabulary_jsonl
args.description: Path to vocabulary JSONL file

scripts.name: resolve_context
scripts.description: Resolve execution context (inst_id, course_map, term_name) needed to process an intent

args.name: intent_json
args.description: TAP intent packet as a JSON string

args.name: context_json
args.description: Prior context JSON from setup intents; pass '{}' if none

args.name: vocabulary_jsonl
args.description: Path to vocabulary JSONL file

scripts.name: direct_call
scripts.description: Execute a direct-mode API call for setup capabilities (create_institution, create_course)

args.name: capability
args.description: Capability name: create_institution or create_course

args.name: payload_json
args.description: API request payload as a JSON string

args.name: on_duplicate
args.description: Duplicate handling strategy: return_existing_id, fail, or ignore

scripts.name: lookup_existing
scripts.description: Search ct-api for an existing student by name, course, and section

args.name: name
args.description: Student full name

args.name: course_name
args.description: Course name as it appears in ct-api

args.name: sec_name
args.description: Section name

scripts.name: build_etl_job
scripts.description: Build an ETL job list from a TAP intent, mapping payload fields to API call lines

args.name: intent_json
args.description: TAP intent packet as a JSON string

args.name: context_json
args.description: Resolved context JSON (inst_id, course_map, term_name)

args.name: behaviour_jsonl
args.description: Path to behaviour JSONL file

scripts.name: stub_cot1
scripts.description: Generate a mock TAP result packet for a given intent (for testing without a live gateway)

args.name: intent_json
args.description: TAP intent packet as a JSON string

scripts.name: upload_etl_to_s3
scripts.description: Upload an ETL job list to S3 and return the S3 path

args.name: etl_content
args.description: ETL job list content (output of build_etl_job.py)

args.name: seq
args.description: Batch sequence number used in the S3 filename

scripts.name: submit_to_rmq
scripts.description: Publish an ETL job message to RabbitMQ pointing to an S3 file

args.name: s3_path
args.description: S3 path to the uploaded ETL file (output of upload_etl_to_s3.py)

args.name: inst_id
args.description: Institution ID (client_id)

args.name: etl_content
args.description: ETL job list content; when supplied, JOB_KEY is used as message_id for idempotent submission

scripts.name: notify_at1qry
scripts.description: POST to the Aetheris resume endpoint to wake at1qry after a gateway result

args.name: at1qry_run_id
args.description: Run ID of the at1qry agent to resume

args.name: message
args.description: Message body to deliver to the waiting agent
